backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (UserProfile, UserSettings, Experience) and query/update methods for experiences, user profiles, and language settings, with access control and blob storage mixins applied.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs (navigation audit, in-app auth modal, AuthChangeBanner update) to their relevant source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the frontend codebase structure and component responsibilities.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, sidebar, chart, and other UI color variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the single-page application, setting the page title to 'Dini.Verse', linking the favicon, and mounting the React app via the root div and main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that creates and registers all TanStack Router routes (home, discover, experience details, profile, auth, and creator pages) and wraps the app with ThemeProvider, TranslationProvider, and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/auth/AccountsDis: Presentational component that displays a 'Login Required' message with internal TanStack Router navigation buttons to /login and /signup, accepting an optional custom message prop.
frontend/src/components/auth/AuthButtons: Header authentication button component that shows Login/Sign Up buttons for unauthenticated users or a Logout button for authenticated users, using useSessionAuth and TanStack Router navigate with no external redirects.
frontend/src/components/auth/RequireProf: Auth guard component that renders its children when the user is authenticated, or shows a login prompt with internal navigation buttons to /login and /signup when unauthenticated.
frontend/src/components/create/builder2d: Renders the 2D builder canvas with interactive drag-and-drop and corner-handle resizing for placed elements, updating element state via the builder hook.
Provides a file input button that reads a user-selected image file and adds it as a decal to the builder canvas.
Displays controls to bring forward, send backward, or delete the currently selected builder element.
Shows sliders and inputs for editing position, opacity, rotation, color, and size of the selected builder element.
Manages saving, loading, exporting, importing, and deleting named canvas prop presets using the useBuilder2DProps hook.
Renders buttons to add rectangle, circle, or triangle shapes to the builder canvas.
frontend/src/components/experiences/Crea: Renders a follow/unfollow button for a creator's principal, toggling follow state via social-following hooks and hiding itself for the current user.
frontend/src/components/experiences/Expe: Displays a single experience as a card with thumbnail, title, description, and creator name, navigating to the experience detail page on click.
Renders a responsive grid of ExperienceCard components with skeleton loading states and an empty-state message.
Provides thumbs-up and thumbs-down buttons that submit ratings for an experience and display current vote counts.
frontend/src/components/experiences/InGa: A fixed in-game menu button that opens dialogs for leaving the game, resetting the character (with confirmation), and accessing settings (placeholder).
frontend/src/components/experiences/Publ: A dialog form for publishing a new experience, collecting title, description, category, gameplay controls, and an optional thumbnail with upload progress.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Root layout component that composes SiteHeader, LeftSidebar, a main content outlet, and SiteFooter into a full-page flex layout.
frontend/src/components/layout/AuthChang: Deprecated stub component that renders nothing, previously used to display an authentication change banner.
frontend/src/components/layout/LeftSideb: A responsive left sidebar with icon-based navigation links to Profile, Social, Inventory, Groups, and Settings pages.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteFoote: A simple footer displaying the copyright year and a 'Built with caffeine.ai' attribution link.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteHeade: Sticky site header with logo, desktop navigation buttons, auth controls, and a collapsible mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/profile/ProfileH: Displays a user's profile card with avatar, display name, and action buttons to Discover or Publish an Experience.
frontend/src/components/social/Following: Shows a list of followed creators with their avatars and display names, and allows the user to unfollow each one.
frontend/src/components/social/FriendsPa: React component that provides a friends management UI, including searching for users, sending/accepting/declining friend requests, and unfriending, using social and profile hooks with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/social/MessagesP: React component that renders a two-panel messaging UI allowing users to search for other users, select a conversation recipient, view message history, and send messages.
frontend/src/components/social/PartiesPa: Placeholder React component displaying a 'Party System Coming Soon' message with a card layout, indicating the feature is not yet implemented.
frontend/src/contexts/TranslationContext: React context provider that supplies a translation function `t` and current language, loading the user's language preference from account settings and falling back to English for missing keys.
frontend/src/hooks/useAccountSettings.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for reading and mutating user account settings (display name, avatar, visibility, language, etc.) via the backend actor, with query invalidation on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches a backend actor instance based on the current Internet Identity, initializing access control and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBuilder2D.ts: Custom hook managing state for a 2D canvas builder, providing actions to add, update, delete, reorder, and clear shape or decal elements.
frontend/src/hooks/useBuilder2DProps.ts: Custom hook for persisting and managing saved 2D builder prop configurations in localStorage, supporting save, delete, export, and import operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useCurrentUser.ts: Thin wrapper hook around `useSessionAuth` that exposes the current authenticated user's username and display name, or null if unauthenticated.
frontend/src/hooks/useExperiences.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching, searching, filtering, creating, and rating experiences via the backend actor, with several mutations stubbed out as not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and identity state to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Consolidates React Query hooks for user profiles and experiences (fetch, search, create, rate) into a single file, with several mutations marked as not yet implemented in the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useSessionAuth.ts: Implements a localStorage-backed session authentication hook with login, signup, and logout functionality using a simple in-memory user store and non-cryptographic token generation.
frontend/src/hooks/useSocialFollowing.ts: Provides placeholder React Query hooks for a creator following system (follow, unfollow, follower count, is-following), all disabled or stubbed pending backend implementation.
frontend/src/hooks/useSocialFriends.ts: Provides React Query hooks for a friends system (list friends, pending requests, send/respond to requests, unfriend), all stubbed as not yet implemented in the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useSocialMessages.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and sending direct messages between principals, with both query and mutation stubbed pending backend implementation.
frontend/src/hooks/useSocialParties.ts: Provides a single placeholder React Query hook for fetching the current party, disabled and returning null until the backend party system is implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useTranslation.ts: Re-exports the translation context hook from TranslationContext as a convenience useTranslation hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserDiscovery.ts: Provides a disabled React Query hook for searching users by term, returning an empty array until the backend implements session-based user search.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserProfile.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user profiles (current user, by principal, and sign-up), all currently disabled/stubbed pending backend session auth implementation.
frontend/src/i18n/translations.ts: Exports a translations object containing English UI strings organized by feature area (nav, auth, home, discover, profile, social, settings, etc.) for i18n support.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports the Outfit font, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark themes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AvatarShop.tsx: Placeholder page for the Avatar Shop displaying category cards (Clothing, Accessories, Premium, Animations) with a 'Coming Soon' message and disabled browse button.
frontend/src/pages/Create.tsx: Landing page for the Create section that presents two navigation cards: one for the 2D Games Builder and one for the UGC Accessories creator.
Full-page 2D game builder editor layout composing ShapePalette, DecalUploader, LayerControls, BuilderCanvas, PropertiesPanel, and PropsPanel components driven by the useBuilder2D hook.
Placeholder page for the UGC Accessories Creator showing a 'Coming Soon' message with a back-navigation button to the Create landing page.
frontend/src/pages/DiniBucks.tsx: Displays the Dini Bucks virtual currency page, showing the user's balance (if authenticated) and informational cards about earning, spending, trading, and premium features.
frontend/src/pages/Discover.tsx: Renders the experience discovery page with search, category tabs, trending experiences, and a publish dialog for authenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/ExperienceDetails.tsx: Shows detailed information for a single experience including thumbnail, creator info, ratings, and a play button that simulates launching the experience for authenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/Groups.tsx: Placeholder page for the Groups feature, displaying an empty state card indicating the user has not joined any groups yet.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page that greets authenticated users with their profile, shows recommended experiences, and displays a friend activity sidebar.
frontend/src/pages/Inventory.tsx: Placeholder inventory page showing an empty state card prompting users to visit the Avatar Shop to acquire items.
frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx: Login form page that accepts username and password, calls the session auth hook to authenticate, and redirects to home on success.
frontend/src/pages/Profile.tsx: Displays the authenticated user's profile page with avatar, display name, username, and buttons to edit profile or navigate to settings. Wrapped in RequireProfile to enforce authentication.
frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx: Account settings page allowing authenticated users to update display name, visibility, language, gender, and delete their account, with a login prompt shown to unauthenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/SignUp.tsx: Sign-up form page that collects username, optional display name, password, and confirmation, then calls the signup hook and redirects to home on success.
frontend/src/pages/Social.tsx: Social hub page with tabbed panels for Friends, Messages, Parties, and Following; redirects unauthenticated users to an AccountsDisabledNotice.
frontend/src/utils/formatError.ts: Utility function that normalizes any thrown value (Error objects, strings, backend error objects) into a human-readable English message string.
frontend/src/utils/sessionToken.ts: Provides get, set, and clear helpers for persisting a session token in localStorage under a fixed key.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both regular and hash-based routes, with optional sessionStorage persistence and hash cleanup helpers.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, content paths, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, typography/container-queries/animate plugins, and accordion keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the state of the Dini.Verse website project, recording architectural rules (no external redirects, in-website auth only), known issues, existing features, and pending fix requests for navigation and authentication flows.
